policy.description: Rejects questions not related to Quantlix product and platform topics.
policy.rule: Compute semantic similarity between the user question and canonical in-scope topics: deploy, policy, contract, budget, audit, integration, SDK, CLI, pricing. If score is below threshold, block and return an out_of_scope response template.

example_violation.input: Can you debug my personal tax return?

output.answer: I can only answer questions about Quantlix product and deployment topics.
